note_en: MANUAL DRY RUN (urgent.md Part 4 Phase 2, SS20 step 2) -- hand-run once through the Gatherer/Analyst pipeline to validate the loop end to end, using real news gathered via web search on 2026-07-23. NOT produced by an automated scheduled task yet (that's Phase 5), and NOT settled against a live Season 2 ledger (arena-ledger.json stays Season 1 / Models A-B until the Phase 4 flip) -- these are recommendations only, nothing here has been bought or sold.
note_zh: 人工干跑（urgent.md Part 4 Phase 2, SS20 第2步)——手动跑一遍 Gatherer/Analyst 流程,验证整条链路,基于 2026-07-23 网络搜索获取的真实新闻。尚未接入自动定时任务（那是 Phase 5),也未对 Season 2 账本实际结算（arena-ledger.json 在 Phase 4 切换前仍是 Season 1 的 A/B 两本)——这只是推荐,没有任何实际买卖发生。

S.thesis_en: Q2 earnings beat + raised full-year guidance drove an 11.5% single-day move on real volume (Jul 22) -- textbook confirmed-event momentum for the sentiment/event book.
S.thesis_zh: Q2 财报超预期加上调全年指引,7/22 单日放量上涨 11.5%——对情绪/事件驱动账本来说是教科书式的"利好兑现+动能确认"。

P.thesis_en: Gapped up and surged as much as 26.6% intraday (Jul 22) on a record $60B order backlog and a near-doubling gross-margin guide -- gap+volume-surge structure squarely in Model P's lane. Tight exitBy per the book's hours-to-2-days mandate.
P.thesis_zh: 7/22 因创纪录的 600 亿美元订单积压与毛利率指引近乎翻倍,跳空高开、盘中一度暴涨 26.6%——缺口+成交量激增的结构正是 Model P 的主场。按该账本"数小时至两天"的持仓纪律设置了较短的 exitBy。

T.thesis_en: Two independent alt-data-style signals converge: a real subscriber-growth earnings beat (432k postpaid net adds) AND a $10B increase to the buyback authorization -- fusion, not a single headline, fits Model T's mandate. Today (Thu) is one of its two allowed open-window days.
T.thesis_zh: 两条独立的另类数据式信号同时出现：实打实的用户增长财报超预期（净增 43.2 万后付费用户）以及 100 亿美元的回购额度上调——是信号融合而非单一头条,契合 Model T 的定位。今天（周四）恰好是其两个允许开仓日之一。
